seoTitle: Boulia vs Bowen — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Boulia and Bowen. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Boulia and Bowen.
heading: Boulia vs Bowen — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boulia, Queensland and Bowen, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boulia and Bowen have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Boulia or Bowen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boulia has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Bowen scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boulia scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Bowen scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boulia or Bowen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boulia has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
